title: OmniProject board view
description: A methodology lens over the project's work items. One file per view under assets/views/<id>.json.

group.description: Methodology family shown as a heading in the switcher.

methodology.description: Human display name of the methodology.

methodologies.description: Methodology TAGS — selecting one activates the assets sharing it. "*" = neutral/always.

needs.description: Backend capability domain this view needs to be fully useful (or omitted = always).
